name: 𝐀𝐈 𝐆𝐢𝐫𝐥
overview: This story follows Gen, a freelance designer who specializes in designing faces with artificial intelligence. However, her life turns chaotic when she receives Ai, a robot specializing in service, who turns her life upside down, especially in the romantic sphere.

trailers.title: OFFICIAL PILOT | AI Girl จะ Gen จนกว่าจะเจอ
